text: The product arrived damaged, but no one is responding to my emails.

I recently upgraded my plan because I was promised access to all features, yet I still find that many of them remain inaccessible. It's hard to believe that after spending extra, I'm still facing the same limitations as before. Can someone please clarify why this is happening? It's quite confusing.
